source_pr.title: ddl: fix data race about ReorgWaitTimeout in tests
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->
```
WARNING: DATA RACE
Write at 0x000003a867b0 by goroutine 144:
  github.com/pingcap/tidb/ddl_test.(*testDBSuite).TestCancelDropColumn()

  github.com/pingcap/tidb/ddl_test.(*testDBSuite).TestCancelDropColumn()
      /home/jenkins/workspace/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/go/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/ddl/db_test.go:1086 +0x20e

  github.com/pingcap/tidb/ddl.(*worker).runReorgJob()
      /home/jenkins/workspace/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/go/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/ddl/reorg.go:129 +0x706

```
### What is changed and how it works?
The `ReorgWaitTimeout` is set in ddl_test.go, we needn't set it again. So I remove it.
